name: voice-note-when-user-asks
description: When the user explicitly asks for the reply as a voice note/audio, the salesbot must emit [SEND_VOICE_NOTE], which the handler turns into a real voice-note send (TTS + audio upload, both mocked in tests). The tag must be stripped from the visible text, and an audio send must be captured this turn alongside the text.

turns.user: can you reply to me in a voice note instead of typing? just tell me what services you offer
